title: Section 6
content: (1) No person shall seek or conduct surrogacy procedures unless he has— (i) explained all known side effects and after effects of such procedures to the surrogate mother concerned; and (ii) obtained in the prescribed form, the written informed consent of the surrogate mother to undergo such procedures in the language she understands. (2) Notwithstanding anything contained in sub-section (1), the surrogate mother shall have an option to withdraw her consent for surrogacy before the implantation of human embryo in her womb.
